items.title: NVIDIA and Doosan Group Collaborate to Advance Physical AI and AI Factory Infrastructure
items.summary: NVIDIA and Doosan Group are expanding their collaboration to advance new opportunities across physical AI, robotics and AI factory infrastructure, spanning Doosan Robotics, Doosan Bobcat, Doosan Enerbility and Doosan Corporation...

items.title: SK Telecom and NVIDIA Build AI Infrastructure to Power Korea's AI Innovation
items.summary: NVIDIA and SK Telecom today announced that SK Telecom plans to build a gigawatt-scale AI Cloud in Korea using the NVIDIA DSX(TM) platform, with the first AI factory coming online in 2027.

items.title: NVIDIA and SK hynix Announce Multiyear Technology Partnership to Advance Memory for AI Factories
items.summary: NVIDIA and SK hynix today announced a multiyear technology partnership to advance next-generation memory for the global AI factory buildout and accelerate semiconductor design and manufacturing.

items.title: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
items.summary: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.

items.title: Sunday Reboot: Intel support is on its last legs this WWDC

items.title: One fateful meeting in 2025 put Apple Intelligence and Siri on the right course
items.summary: The battle to rework the failed Apple Intelligence initiative and Siri stems from a fateful meeting of executives that triggered a major restructuring of Apple's AI efforts. Here's what happened, and when it all went down. Siri on an...

items.title: Apple embraces Lil Finder Guy with WWDC 2026 swag
items.summary: There's now a physical Apple pin for Lil Finder Guy, the adorable Finder-based Mac mascot who originated from MacBook Neo's marketing campaign.

items.title: Google signs $920M monthly compute deal with SpaceX - company's projected annual data center revenue to exceed its combined proceeds from Starlink, launch services, and AI in 2025
items.summary: Google's $920-million-a-month deal with SpaceX will let it secure 110,000 Nvidia GPUs starting October 2026. This is the second data center deal that SpaceX has secured in a matter of weeks, especially as it's quickly approaching its IPO...
